title: The Allstate Corporation 2025 Annual Report and Form 10-K
note: Primary source for business segments, risk factors, underwriting context, revenue, profitability, and property-liability insurance operations.

title: Allstate Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
note: Investor presentation reporting 2025 total revenues of $67.7 billion and net income applicable to common shareholders of $10.2 billion.

title: Auto Insurance
note: Official product page for Allstate's auto insurance offering and coverage positioning.

title: Homeowners Insurance
note: Official product page describing Allstate homeowners coverage for dwelling, personal property, liability, and bundling.

title: Allstate Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for Allstate's May 2026 market capitalization estimate.

title: Allstate P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for Allstate's trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: Oasis Loss Modelling Framework
note: Open-source catastrophe modelling platform relevant to transparent homeowners and catastrophe-risk alternatives.

title: Oasis Loss Modelling Framework GitHub
note: Public repositories for Oasis LMF components and example models.

title: Open Data Transformation Framework
note: Technical documentation for open catastrophe modelling data transformation and interoperability.

title: CoSure Open-Source Policy Administration System
note: Open-source policy administration software relevant to smaller insurance operators, brokers, and cooperative insurance infrastructure.

title: OPAL Policy and Data Administration
note: Open-source policy and data administration layer useful as a general reference for distributed policy-rule synchronization in regulated workflows.
